case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. MARCO ANTONIO ANGUIANO HERNANDEZ

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL COPR. ) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANGUIANO HERNANDEZ, MARCO ANTONIO $1,180.21 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,255.21 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ANGUIANO HERNANDEZ, MARCO ANTONIO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($45.00) SERVED JUL-24-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ANGUIANO HERNANDEZ, MARCO ANTONIO
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL COPR. )

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-23-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-23-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY LENIA RODRIGUEZ--LEGAL ASSISTANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-23-2015 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,180.21 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL COPR. ) AS TO DEFENDANT ANGUIANO HERNANDEZ, MARCO ANTONIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-23-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
